item.title: A message from the main office:
item.description: A reminder for students in grades 9 to 12 that want to dress down during your exams; you must donate at least 2 uniform items to the main office before Friday, June 12th for your name to be on the list given to teachers.

item.title: A message from Guidance:
item.description: All students who have enrolled in a summer course, an important meeting will be held today at 1pm in the atrium. See a Teams message from Mr. Spence for more details!

item.title: A message from Mme Perron:
item.description: There will be a MANDATORY Europe Team meeting tomorrow at lunch in room 125. Please bring your lunch. All travelers must attend. We will be discussing our Trivia Night Fundraiser in detail, with a few trip updates and some powerpoints to review on the Battles of Vimy and Paschendaele. Attendance will be taken at this meeting. Please bring any donations for trivia night that you have collected with you to the meeting.

item.title: A message from Mr. Cornellier:
item.description: The Athletic Awards will take place today during period 2 for all grade 9-12 classes. Teachers are asked to take attendance and to immediately come down to the gym. Do not wait to be called down.

item.title: A message from M. Benoit:
item.description: There will be an important flag football meeting in room 247 at 11:20. Please check the list posted in the 7&8 stairwell before attending.
